title: My Life in Christ, or Moments of Spiritual Serenity and Contemplation
author: St. John of Kronstadt (Ivan Ilyich Sergiev, 1829-1908)
edition: Goulaeff English translation (London, 1897). Public-domain PDF transcribed from the Christian Classics Ethereal Library (CCEL.org).
copyrightNote: Both the Russian original by St. John of Kronstadt and the 1897 English translation by E.E. Goulaeff are in the public domain. PDF source is the CCEL (Christian Classics Ethereal Library) edition, which is itself public-domain.
